Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Sut.text: Akkhipaṭalāni hadayaṅgatāni (Sī, Ka), Abhi-Ṭṭha 1. 345 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Kāraṇabhūtāhi (Sī, Syā, Ka), Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 72; Visuddhi 2. 116 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Paṭipakkhaniyamanaṁ (Syā, Gaṇṭhipade ca) Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 107 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Dvāsīti khuddakavattāni (Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 283; Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 23 piṭṭhesu), Vi 4. 239 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Yā cassa (Syā, Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 287; Ma-Ṭṭha 3. 176 piṭṭhesu ca)
Yadidaṁ (Syā, Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 210; Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 249 piṭṭhesu ca) Gaṇṭhipade pana passitabbaṁ.
Tiṇṇaṁ (Sī, Aṁ-Ṭṭha 1. 85; Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 52; Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 65 piṭṭhesupi) Gaṇṭhipade pana passitabbaṁ.
Parassa haraṇaṁ (Sī, Syā, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 1. 70 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Paṭiventīti passati (Sabbattha) Visuddhi 2. 266 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Paṭiventīti passati (Sabbattha) Visuddhi 2. 266 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Paṭipakkhaniyamanaṁ (Syā, Gaṇṭhipade ca) Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 107 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
Attano sabhāveneva attano santakassa kassaci abhāvā (Sī)

variants.reading: Attano sabhāveneva attano santakassa kassaci abhāvā

Paṭisambhidāmaggaṭṭhakathā/Mahāvagga/Sut.text: Saha adhiṭṭhānacittena (Visuddhi 2. 18 piṭṭhe), saha adhiṭṭhānāya (Syā, Ka)
Sāmaṁ (Gaṇṭhipade) Abhi-Ṭṭha 2. 142; Visuddhi 2. 177 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.
Sattahitapaṭipattiyaṁ (Sī, Syā, Ka) Abhi-Ṭṭha 1. 192 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
